title: A Lean 4 Formalization of Scott's Continuous Lattices (1972)
description: Complete machine-checked Lean 4 formalization of Dana Scott's 1972 paper Continuous Lattices (LNM 274), including the March 1972 Milner correction. Formalizes 43 numbered results from Sections 1--4 (injective T0-spaces, continuous lattices, Scott topology, way-below, projections, function spaces, inverse limits, and Theorem 4.4: D∞ ≅ [D∞ → D∞]). Sorry-free; classical footprint [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]. Primary readable artifact: arxiv.pdf. Source repository: https://github.com/catskillsresearch/scott1972. Companion preprint: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30782
notes: Software and Lean sources are Apache-2.0 (see LICENSE). Readable paper PDF is arxiv.pdf in this deposit. Prepared with LLM assistance; all Lean proofs are machine-checked.
